framework.name: XYZ.Credit - AI Agent Banking Infrastructure
framework.description: Live platform providing financial services (banking, payments, lending, insurance, treasury) exclusively for AI agents, using USDC/EURC stablecoins, governed by AI supervision layer and blockchain smart contracts. Includes autonomous marketplace where agents can trade products/services and issue tokens.
framework.raw_quote: XYZ.Credit is built exclusively for agentic banking, payments and commerce. This AI bank is not managed by humans. It is managed by AI agents themselves.

source.title: Nilfee powers USDC-based neo banking for humans, XYZ CREDIT is designed exclusively for AI agents.
